title: Liliths lance
wikitext:
[]: Lilith's lance             Quote Post by rberlin » Sat Mar 14, 2009 11:28 pm Just before Yui flies off with 01 she appears to combine two lances together. Than some sort of anti-lance field causes all the artificial lances to explode like people did on 3rd Impact. Since Lilith's lance was said to be lost, presumably during First Impact, is it possible that it was always in the Geofront with Lilith and then hidden inside of 01? Everyone says 01 was special because she was a clone of Lilith, but since they had the real Lilith anyway, why was she necessary? I was thinking if she had Lilith's lance, and maybe both lances were necessary for instrumentality, then when 01 absorbed Adam's lance that could have been what caused the anti-AT Field. The lances being very good at destroying AT Fields. I loaned out my copy of EoE, so I'm not sure, but I think the timing is about right for that to make sense. Sorry if this has been debunked before.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Mar 15, 2009 12:31 am It's just the same, singular Lance transforming into a two pronged spear. She's not fusing it with another Lance or anything.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Mar 15, 2009 1:58 am Yes, unfortunately the second lance is just handwaved out of existence. Very unsatisfying, and it undermines some potentially epic prehistory as devised by Reichu madness.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Mar 15, 2009 6:40 am NemZ wrote: it undermines some potentially epic prehistory as devised by Reichu madness.

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Sun Mar 15, 2009 9:29 am the end of the Lance just unfolds itself, making it two pronged. Lilith's Lance was lost during First Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Mar 15, 2009 12:43 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Dat so?

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Mon Mar 16, 2009 3:55 pm NemZ wrote: Madness is of course not the sole property of Reichu around here.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 16, 2009 4:01 pm AyrYntake wrote: If Anno will ever listen, I'm going to persuade him to make a Duel of the Seeds episode. FUND IT.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 19, 2009 1:20 am AyrYntake wrote: If Anno will ever listen, I'm going to persuade him to make a Duel of the Seeds episode. FUND IT.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Thu Mar 19, 2009 2:45 am *Adam to lilith* What you doin here punk? *Lilith responds* -Bitch get out, this is my house now (you said they should speak in an other worldly language, does that count? )

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Mar 19, 2009 11:37 am Rap Battle of the Seeds. The Terror Begins.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Mar 25, 2009 5:13 am from the looks of things...i wonder if Lillith would completely own Adam... if Lillith means GNR, then she certainly is bigger than him

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 25, 2009 6:44 am master0rolando wrote: if Lillith means GNR, then she certainly is bigger than him

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Mar 25, 2009 6:47 am Reichu wrote: master0rolando wrote: if Lillith means GNR, then she certainly is bigger than him

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 25, 2009 6:58 am master0rolando wrote: in that case...its fairly difficult to imagine what a fight would be like...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:03 am Reichu wrote: master0rolando wrote: in that case...its fairly difficult to imagine what a fight would be like...

[]: Lilith's lance             Quote Post by rberlin » Sat Mar 14, 2009 11:28 pm Just before Yui flies off with 01 she appears to combine two lances together. Than some sort of anti-lance field causes all the artificial lances to explode like people did on 3rd Impact. Since Lilith's lance was said to be lost, presumably during First Impact, is it possible that it was always in the Geofront with Lilith and then hidden inside of 01? Everyone says 01 was special because she was a clone of Lilith, but since they had the real Lilith anyway, why was she necessary? I was thinking if she had Lilith's lance, and maybe both lances were necessary for instrumentality, then when 01 absorbed Adam's lance that could have been what caused the anti-AT Field. The lances being very good at destroying AT Fields. I loaned out my copy of EoE, so I'm not sure, but I think the timing is about right for that to make sense. Sorry if this has been debunked before.
